source_limit_notes: Aggregate reference profile from Sprint 4 sanitized corpus summaries and local DB-backed dry-run evidence.
No copied public decklist is stored in this profile artifact.
Profile replaces legacy edhrec-only guidance with Commander Reference shape and explicit expected packages.

themes.name: five_color_legendary_cascade_value
themes.notes: Jodah needs high legendary density so the anthem and pseudo-cascade text are active.

themes.name: legendary_typal_cascade
themes.notes: Prefer legendary permanents and historic payoffs over unrelated five-color goodstuff.

themes.name: five_color_ramp_fixing
themes.notes: Fixing and ramp are mandatory because the curve and color demands are high.

themes.name: legendary_protection_recursion
themes.notes: Protect the board and recover from wipes because the deck commits many permanents.

themes.name: historic_legendary_value
themes.notes: Historic/legendary draw and value cards should support the core plan rather than replace it.

examples: generic five-color staples with no legendary, historic, cascade, fixing, or protection role
avoid_patterns.reason: Jodah decks must remain legends/cascade decks, not generic five-color piles.

examples: hands or generated shells with many five-color legends but too little fixing
avoid_patterns.reason: The profile requires strong fixing before expensive legends and value chains.

examples: duplicated nonbasic lands or duplicated legendary staples
avoid_patterns.reason: Commander singleton rules still apply even when all colors are legal.
